description: Verso: Right upper corner of lucidly written list of contributors, the first thirteen each donating 2 dirhams. All names appear in abbreviated form. Some of the same people as in T-S NS J235 (PGPID 4659). (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 491)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
